children.name: summary
children.text: Ship the docs refresh without changing parser behavior.

children.name: decision
children.text: Plain top-level text remains the only paragraph source syntax.

children.name: constraint
children.text: Do not reintroduce explicit paragraph blocks in source files.

children.name: api
children.text: Parses source into the shared AST.

children.name: task
children.text: Verify public docs, examples, and packages agree on the same syntax.

children.name: risk
children.text: Stale examples can teach old syntax even when the parser is correct.

children.name: depends-on
children.text: Docs must show plain prose instead of an explicit paragraph tag.
